«b»Biography«/b»
Sir Thomas Chaworth, Sheriff of Nottingham, Lincolnshire, & Derbyshire, born circa 1375, Wivreton, Nottinghamshire, England, died 10 February 1459, buried at Launde Priory, Leicesters …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Chaworth於1375年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親William de Chaworth19歲，母親Alice Caltoft14歲。他於1393年9月21日之前與Nichola Braybrooke在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年2月17日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾享年83歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾洛特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Chaworth于1375年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲William de Chaworth19岁，母亲Alice Caltoft14岁。他于1393年9月21日之前与Nichola Braybrooke在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年2月17日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾享年83岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾洛特。

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Chaworth was born in 1375, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, William de Chaworth, was 19 and his mother, Alice Caltoft, was 14. He married Nichola Braybrooke before 21 September 1393, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 February 1458, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Lount, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Chaworth est né en 1375, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Chaworth, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Caltoft, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Nichola Braybrooke avant 21 septembre 1393, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1458, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Lount, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Chaworth 1375 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Chaworth 19 und seine Mutter Alice Caltoft 14. Er hat vor 21. September 1393 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Nichola Braybrooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1458 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lount, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chaworth è nato il nel 1375 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William de Chaworth, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Alice Caltoft, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Nichola Braybrooke prima del 21 settembre 1393, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1458, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Lount, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Chaworthが1375年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Chaworthは19歳，母Alice Caltoftは14歳であった。1393年9月21日以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでNichola Braybrookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年2月17日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで83歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアロウントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Chaworth(이)가 1375년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Chaworth(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Caltoft(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1393년 9월 21일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Nichola Braybrooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 2월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 루트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Chaworth nasceu em 1375, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Chaworth, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Caltoft, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichola Braybrooke antes 21 de setembro de 1393, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1458, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Lount, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England: Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Chaworth родился в 1375 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Chaworth было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Caltoft, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichola Braybrooke перед 21 сентябрь 1393 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 февраля 1458 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности лоунт, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Nichola Braybrooke antes de 21 de septiembre de 1393, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1458, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Lount, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
